title: Data and scripts for: Nuclear-chloroplast marker discordance and cross-border geographic structuring in two karst-endemic plant genera (Begonia sect. Coelocentrum, Begoniaceae; Hemiboea, Gesneriaceae) of the Sino-Vietnamese Limestone Belt
description: Aligned FASTA files, IQ-TREE 3.1.1 ML treefiles and log files, AU test input/output, R visualisation scripts, and figures for a phylogeographic study of Begonia sect. Coelocentrum and Hemiboea across the Vietnam-China karst border. Submitted to Journal of Asia-Pacific Biodiversity (2026).
notes: Related manuscript submitted to Journal of Asia-Pacific Biodiversity (2026). DOI will be added on acceptance.
